notes: Candidate source registry. Batch 029 adds controlled download metadata. Downloaded files are placed in processing/input/downloads; transformed/normalized raw GeoJSON files will later be placed in processing/input/raw.

sources.label: Kane County boundary
sources.authority: U.S. Census Bureau TIGER/Line county boundary
sources.candidate_query: Filter downloaded county features to STATEFP=17 and COUNTYFP=089.
sources.license_review: public-source review required before production use
sources.notes: Used later for clipping prepared geometry and validating grid extent. The raw source is a national county shapefile; prepared output should contain only Kane County, Illinois.
sources.download_notes: Controlled download of source ZIP. Later processing must extract/convert/clip into raw GeoJSON.

sources.label: Kane County address points
sources.authority: Kane County / ArcGIS Online public FeatureServer
sources.license_review: public-source review required before production use
sources.notes: Candidate source for address-location references; does not replace field observation and does not expose HOA unit counts by itself.
sources.download_notes: Controlled download as GeoJSON from the FeatureServer query endpoint. Later processing may copy/normalize into raw/.

sources.label: Building footprints
sources.authority: Illinois State Water Survey / Microsoft building footprints via Illinois Flood Maps
sources.candidate_query: Download Kane (MS) shapefile ZIP, convert to GeoJSON, clip/validate against Kane County boundary.
sources.license_review: public-source review required before production use
sources.notes: Candidate source for red residential building geometry. Building polygons may not equal separate residential buildings and may require classification and field verification.
sources.download_notes: Controlled download of source ZIP. Later processing must extract/convert/clip into raw GeoJSON.

sources.label: Road centerlines
sources.candidate_query: County-specific TIGER/Line roads shapefile for FIPS 17089.
sources.license_review: public-source review required before production use
sources.notes: Candidate source for white orientation roads. Later processing should simplify, classify, and possibly omit non-useful path types.
sources.download_notes: Controlled download of source ZIP. Later processing must extract/convert/clip into raw GeoJSON.

sources.label: Water polygons
sources.authority: U.S. Census Bureau TIGER/Line area hydrography
sources.candidate_query: County-specific TIGER/Line area water shapefile for FIPS 17089.
sources.license_review: public-source review required before production use
sources.notes: Candidate source for blue ponds and water features. Later processing should retain orientation-useful water polygons and simplify very small slivers.
sources.download_notes: Controlled download of source ZIP. Later processing must extract/convert/clip into raw GeoJSON.

sources.label: Forest and wooded polygons
sources.candidate_query: No acquisition source confirmed. Evaluate forest-preserve boundaries, municipal/open GIS, or land-cover sources before use.
sources.license_review: source and reuse rights must be confirmed before production use
sources.notes: Candidate source for green orientation polygons. Forest preserves and wooded land cover are not identical; do not treat preserve boundaries as tree canopy without further review.
sources.download_notes: Deferred until source and reuse rights are confirmed.
